bugs.description: Skins overlay (alpha 0.85) does not fully obscure menu text behind it - title, PLAY, HOW TO PLAY, SKINS buttons bleed through behind skin circles

observations: Swipe-to-slide mechanic is intuitive with queued input support - ball slides until hitting wall
Neon aesthetic (cyan ball, gold gems, green exit, pink spikes) on dark background is visually striking
Ghost trail crossing for ECHO speed boost is a creative mechanic rewarding spatial memory
Camera shake (80ms) + ball squash/stretch on swipe provides satisfying juice
Gem collection has scale+fade particle effect, exit portal has spinning animation
Star system (1-3 per maze based on gems + par moves) adds depth to each level
Timer bar with green/yellow/red color gradient creates urgency without unfairness
Inactivity spike mechanic (10s timeout) with red vignette warning enforces active play
Pause menu with RESUME/HOW TO PLAY/RESTART MAZE/QUIT TO MENU is complete
Par move counter and under-par bonus encourage route optimization
ECHO combo system (x2, x3... scaling text size) is visually exciting and rewards skill
Score floating text (+35, +65 etc) provides immediate feedback on point gains
High score persists across sessions (verified: Hi: 25 shown on menu after reload)
Best maze number persists (verified: Best: Maze 1 on menu)
Total stars tracked as meta-progression currency for skin unlocks
6 ball skins unlockable (Default free, Pulse 15 stars, Plasma 40, Nova 75, Void 120, Prismatic 200)
Procedural mazes via seeded RNG - deterministic per level number (same maze for maze N every time)
Deterministic seeding reduces variety on replays of the same level
Phasing walls (purple, cycle on/off) and moving spikes add variety at higher difficulties (maze 8+)
Rest mazes every 10 levels (easier params) provide pacing relief
7-tier difficulty system scaling grid size (7->9->11), timer, spike count, etc.
How to Play screen has animated ball demo, 6 rules with icons, 3 tips - good onboarding
Skins gallery shows all 6 skins with star requirements, current selection highlighted
Game over screen has score count-up animation, NEW BEST indicator, rewarded ad continue option

screenshotsVerified.bc-01-load: Title screen renders correctly with all UI elements
screenshotsVerified.bc-03-start: Maze 1 visible: 7x7 grid, cyan ball top-left, 2 gold gems, green exit bottom-right, HUD complete
screenshotsVerified.bc-04-swipes: Ghost trail (cyan line) visible, x2 ECHO text, score 60, Moves: 2
screenshotsVerified.bc-05-gameplay: Extended play: x8 ECHO, score 480, ball near exit, ghost trails covering maze, Moves: 16
screenshotsVerified.bc-06-inactivity: GAME OVER screen after inactivity: score 25, NEW BEST, Watch Ad + Play Again + Menu buttons
screenshotsVerified.bc-07-stress: Rapid swipes: no crash, x5 ECHO, score 225, ghost trails visible, Moves: 10
screenshotsVerified.po-04-pause: Pause overlay: PAUSED title, RESUME/HOW TO PLAY/RESTART MAZE/QUIT TO MENU buttons
screenshotsVerified.po-06-death: Still in maze after death wait, score 1105, Moves: 32, timer bar nearly empty (red)
screenshotsVerified.rt-02-menu: Menu shows Hi: 25 (persisted from prior session), Stars: 0
screenshotsVerified.rt-06-help: How to Play: animated ball demo, directional arrows, 6 rules with icons, 3 tips, GOT IT button
screenshotsVerified.rt-07-skins: Ball Skins overlay: 6 skins displayed, Default selected (cyan highlight), others show star cost, BACK button
